name: Elena Rodriguez
summary: Highly accomplished Principal Cloud Solutions Architect with over 15 years of experience designing, implementing, and managing complex, scalable cloud infrastructures. Proven expertise in multi-cloud environments, focusing on optimizing performance, security, and cost-efficiency for enterprise-level solutions. Passionate about leveraging cutting-edge cloud technologies to drive business innovation and digital transformation.

experience.title: Principal Cloud Solutions Architect
experience.description: Lead the design and architecture of cloud-native solutions for enterprise clients, specializing in AWS and Azure. Develop strategic roadmaps for cloud adoption, migration, and modernization. Mentor junior architects and engineers, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure successful project delivery and operational excellence. Responsible for cost optimization strategies and security best practices across cloud environments.

experience.title: Senior Cloud Engineer
experience.description: Designed and deployed highly available and fault-tolerant cloud solutions on AWS. Managed and automated infrastructure provisioning using Terraform and Ansible. Implemented CI/CD pipelines for application deployment and monitoring. Provided technical leadership on cloud projects and contributed to architectural decision-making.

experience.title: Cloud Infrastructure Specialist
experience.description: Managed and maintained on-premises and early cloud infrastructure. Gained foundational experience in virtualization, networking, and system administration. Supported migration efforts to private cloud environments and assisted in the evaluation of public cloud services.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Engineering
Bachelor of Science in Information Technology
